channel.title: 4minit - Mauritius News in 4 Minutes
channel.description: A free daily newsletter covering Mauritius news, regional developments, and the global headlines that matter — in your inbox every morning.

item.title: 20% costlier materials, Rs 15,000 extra per container: Hormuz is now a local crisis
item.description: Today's 4minit: A month without a deputy PM: who replaces Bérenger? South Africa's police chief suspended over a R360m health contract. Oil crosses $106 as Trump seals off the Strait of Hormuz.. Read more.

item.title: First mpox cases in Mauritius: one patient tracked down after fleeing
item.description: Today's 4minit: Mare-aux-Vacoas at 51%: water cuts are weeks away. Iran seizes Hormuz ships as ceasefire frays. Lebanese journalist killed as Iran-US talks stall.. Read more.

item.title: 'Every day felt like prison': the testimonies breaking from Twaha Academy
item.description: Today's 4minit: Government prepares water rationing plan as drought enters critical phase. Pan-African activist Kemi Seba faces extradition from South Africa to Benin. Trump extends Iran ceasefire but leaves Hormuz blockade in place.. Read more.
